title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Tesco International Ltd
body: "Application number 5155  Applicant Tesco Stores Limited objected to the name used by Tesco International Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 20 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Tesco International Ltd is changed to 15680114, Ltd. "
